product.name: ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
product.titleDescriptor: 100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 360 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 360 g/m², 100% Cotton, Vat Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T11 Chem Pro is heavy weight 360 g/m², vat dyed, chemical resistant,100% cotton merserized workwear fabric.
It is usefull for outdoor winter working conditions.
With water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function.
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
100% Cotton Twill, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 360 gr/m'2
360 g/m², 100% Cotton, Vat Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 3/1S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>1600N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>30N; Weft>25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Properties list includes 'emi' (EMI shielding characteristic) but no explicit statement of electrical/energy sector or high-voltage use is provided.

stage1.noMatchReason: This is a chemical-resistant, vat-dyed 100% cotton workwear fabric intended for coveralls (per technicalParameters 'Application | Coveralls'), used in outdoor winter working conditions with resistance to industrial chemicals (EN ISO 13034). No explicit military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building or transport use is stated in the product data.

evidence: categorySourceGroup: Vat Dyed Workwear Fabrics Resistant to Industrial Chemicals
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly intended for coveralls used as chemical-resistant workwear in industrial environments, matching the general workwear/industrial protective apparel category with no narrower named sector (e.g., welding, firefighting) explicitly stated.

secondary.rationale: No independent secondary application is explicitly supported; EMI property alone is insufficient for energy classification per rule 8/exclusion guidance.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Only an 'emi' property is listed with no explicit statement of electrical/energy sector or high-voltage use, so it cannot be selected per rule 8 and energy exclusion guidance.
Chemical resistance and FR-adjacent properties do not indicate welding/metallurgy use; no molten metal or welding context is stated.
